ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-26-2025 Continued To Jan-27-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Class Allegations Pursuant To California Rules Of Court Rule 3.770(A)-(C)
Off Calendar Nov-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs TODD VALENTINE and DAVID MOYNAHAN Unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Class Allegations Pursuant To California Rules Of Court Rule 3.770(A)-(C).

Plaintiffs Todd Valentine and David Moynihan's unopposed Motion For Dismissal Of Class Allegations Pursuant to California Rules of Court Rule 3.770(A)-(C) is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and consistent with California Rules of Court, rule 3.770, the court orders the class allegations in this action dismissed. The record demonstrates that dismissal will not prejudice class members, thus no notice to the class is required.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
